items.title: prompts.chat
items.summary: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

items.comment: 开源阵营再下一城，但光看参数没用，能不能跑起来、好不好用才是关键。

items.title: LLMs-from-scratch
items.summary: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step
items.summary_cn: 在PyTorch中从头开始逐步实现类似ChatGPT的LLM
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: Algorithmic Monocultures in Hiring
items.title_cn: 招聘中的算法单一文化
items.summary: Many employers screen job applicants with algorithms built by the same few algorithm vendors. We hypothesize that algorithmic monoculture leads to the same individuals and members of the same racial groups facing rejection. We acquire and analyze a novel dataset of 3 million applicants submitting 4 ...
items.summary_cn: 许多雇主使用相同的少数算法供应商构建的算法来筛选求职者。我们假设算法单一文化导致相同的个人和相同种族群体的成员面临拒绝。我们获取并分析了一个由300万申请人提交的新数据集4...
items.comment: 开源是好事，能不能用起来、改起来，才是衡量价值的标准。

items.title: MUSE-Autoskill: Self-Evolving Agents via Skill Creation, Memory, Management, and Evaluation
items.title_cn: MUSE-Autoskill ：通过技能创建、记忆、管理和评估实现自我进化的代理
items.summary: Large language model (LLM) agents rely on reusable skills to solve complex tasks. However, existing skill creation approaches treat skills as isolated and static artifacts, limiting their reusability, reliability, and long-term improvement. We propose MUSE-Autoskill Agent (Memory-Utilizing Skill Evo...
items.summary_cn: 大型语言模型（ LLM ）代理依靠可重复使用的技能来解决复杂的任务。然而，现有的技能创造方法将技能视为孤立和静态的工件，限制了它们的可重用性、可靠性和长期改进。我们推荐MUSE-Autoskill Agent （记忆利用技能EVO...
items.comment: 开源阵营再下一城，但光看参数没用，能不能跑起来、好不好用才是关键。

items.title: LocateAnything: Fast and High-Quality Vision-Language Grounding with Parallel Box Decoding
items.title_cn: LocateAnything ：快速、高质量的视觉语言接地与并行盒子解码
items.summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) commonly formulate visual grounding and detection as a coordinate-token generation problem, serializing each 2D box into multiple 1D tokens that are learned and decoded largely independently. This token-by-token decoding mismatches the coupled structure of box geometry ...
items.summary_cn: 视觉语言模型（ VLM ）通常将视觉接地和检测视为坐标令牌生成问题，将每个2D框序列化为多个1D令牌，这些令牌在很大程度上是独立学习和解码的。这种逐个标记的解码与盒几何的耦合结构不匹配...
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: GPT-4o Mini - OpenAI's Cost-Effective Model

items.comment: 新模型发布，效果先观望，价格先准备好——按token计费的玩法，用得起吗？

items.comment: 商业模型再升级，功能看着牛，钱包要捂紧，按量付费伤不起。

items.title: AI Regulation Updates - EU AI Act Implementation
items.title_cn: 人工智能法规更新-欧盟人工智能法案实施
items.summary: European Union implements AI Act, setting global standard for AI regulation.
items.summary_cn: 欧盟实施《人工智能法案》，为人工智能监管设定全球标准。
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.comment: AI领域新动态，保持关注，别被营销号带节奏。
